mapper.select: SELECT admin_id AS adminId, password, name, phone, role_id AS roleId, fail_count AS failCount, status, is_locked AS isLocked, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, last_failed_at AS lastFailedAt, locked_at AS lockedAt FROM admin_user WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user (admin_id, password, name, phone, role_id, fail_count, status, is_locked, created_at) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{roleId}, COALESCE(#{failCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), FALSE, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(admin_id) FROM admin_user WHERE admin_id LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') AND LENGTH(admin_id) = 7 AND admin_id REGEXP '^[0-9]{7}$' AND admin_id != 'admin' -- admin 제외
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET fail_count = fail_count + 1, is_locked = CASE WHEN (fail_count + 1) > 5 THEN TRUE ELSE is_locked END, last_failed_at = NOW(), locked_at = CASE WHEN (fail_count + 1) > 5 THEN NOW() ELSE locked_at END WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_locked = FALSE
UPDATE admin_user SET fail_count = 0, is_locked = FALSE, last_login_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET is_locked = FALSE, fail_count = 0, locked_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE admin_user SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_user WHERE status != 'DELETED' AND REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]+', '') = REGEXP_REPLACE(#{phone}, '[^0-9]+', '')
AND admin_id != #{currentAdminId}

SELECT admin_id AS adminId, name, phone, role_id AS roleId, status, is_locked AS isLocked, fail_count AS failCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM admin_user
ORDER BY
CASE status WHEN 'INACTIVE' THEN 9 WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 5 END ASC,
admin_id name
CASE role_id WHEN 'SUPER' THEN 1 WHEN 'PROD' THEN 2 WHEN 'SALES' THEN 3 WHEN 'MATERIAL' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
created_at updated_at
CASE status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'INACTIVE' THEN 9 ELSE 5 END
admin_id
DESC ASC , admin_id ASC
CASE role_id WHEN 'SUPER' THEN 1 WHEN 'PROD' THEN 2 WHEN 'SALES' THEN 3 WHEN 'MATERIAL' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END ASC, admin_id ASC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}
